# Copilot Instructions

## Design guide
- Prefer cyberpunk neon, dark mode noir, and space galaxy glow aesthetics for UI redesign requests.
- Use deep background tones with bright gradient accents, glowing borders, and glassmorphism panels.
- Keep the layout clean and readable: responsive spacing, clear typographic hierarchy, and high contrast text.
- Preserve existing template structure and HTMX attributes when editing HTML files.
- Reuse utility CSS classes when possible, but add new theme-specific classes for visual polish.
- Avoid unnecessary JavaScript changes unless the user specifically asks for interactive behavior updates.
